SEPHIROT-OC SQUADRON
====================
Version: 1.0.0
Build: 2026-02-25
Status: PRODUCTION READY

Changelog:
- Fixed LLM executive summary (agents.llm import)
- New importlib system to avoid agents/ namespace collision
- Absolute paths for project root reliability
- Tested: 200 signals → 168 filtered → 3 top + 10 watchlist
- Email delivery verified

Dependencies:
- Python 3.9+
- ~/dev/openclawmasters_agents/agents/llm.py
- ~/.freejack-credentials.env (TAVILY_API_KEY)
- ~/.openclaw/config/email_global.json (optional)
